channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Top Vitamins and Nutrients for Women's Health
Giuliana Rancic Opens Up About Career, Breast Cancer, and Fitness
item.description: In a recent WebMD Real Stories Breast Cancer guide, Rancic, 51, discusses her red carpet career, breast cancer experience, and staying active.

item.title: Early Signs of Breast Cancer to Watch For
Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship Highlights CDC Failures
item.description: The hantavirus outbreak on the Dutch cruise ship MV Hondius raises questions. Dutch ornithologist Leo Schilpe...
